# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-admin-debug-config
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  meshConfig:
    # Enable access logging for debugging
    accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
    accessLogEncoding: JSON
    # Set default proxy configuration
    defaultConfig:
      # Set the Envoy admin port
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      # Enable proxy-level debugging
      concurrency: 2
      # Set proxy log level for troubleshooting
      proxyStatsMatcher:
        inclusionRegexps:
          - ".*"
  components:
    pilot:
      k8s:
        env:
          - name: PILOT_ENABLE_DEBUG_ENNVOY_LOG
            value: "true"
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        # Expose admin port for debugging
        statusPort: 15020
        # Enable privileged mode for full admin access
        privileged: false
    pilot:
      env:
        PILOT_ENABLE_WORKLOAD_ENTRY_AUTOREGISTRATION: "true"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-sidecar-admin-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  # Apply to all workloads across all namespaces
  egress:
    - hosts:
        - "*/*"
  ingress:
    - port:
        number: 15000
        protocol: TCP
        name: envoy-admin
      defaultEndpoint: 127.0.0.1:15000
---
# EnvoyFilter to expose admin endpoints for debugging
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-debug-endpoints
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  configPatches:
    # Expose admin interface endpoints on a debug listener
    - applyTo: LISTENER
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      patch:
        operation: ADD
        value:
          name: envoy_admin_debug_listener
          address:
            socket_address:
              address: 0.0.0.0
              port_value: 15100
          filter_chains:
            - filters:
                - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                  typed_config:
                    "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                    stat_prefix: admin_debug
                    codec_type: AUTO
                    route_config:
                      name: admin_debug_route
                      virtual_hosts:
                        - name: admin_debug
                          domains:
                            - "*"
                          routes:
                            # Route for /config_dump
                            - match:
                                path: /config_dump
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                            # Route for /stats
                            - match:
                                prefix: /stats
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                            # Route for /clusters
                            - match:
                                path: /clusters
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                            # Route for /server_info
                            - match:
                                path: /server_info
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                            # Route for /listeners
                            - match:
                                path: /listeners
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                            # Route for /ready
                            - match:
                                path: /ready
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                            # Route for /logging
                            - match:
                                prefix: /logging
                              route:
                                cluster: envoy_admin
                    http_filters:
                      - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                        typed_config:
                          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
    # Add admin cluster definition
    - applyTo: CLUSTER
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
      patch:
        operation: ADD
        value:
          name: envoy_admin
          connect_timeout: 5s
          type: STATIC
          lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
          load_assignment:
            cluster_name: envoy_admin
            endpoints:
              - lb_endpoints:
                  - endpoint:
                      address:
                        socket_address:
                          address: 127.0.0.1
                          port_value: 15000
---
# ProxyConfig to ensure admin port is set globally
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ProxyConfig
metadata:
  name: global-admin-proxy-config
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  concurrency: 2
  # Selector applies to all workloads (empty selector = all)
  environmentVariables:
    # Enable debug endpoints on the Envoy admin interface
    ISTIO_ENABLE_DEBUG: "true"
---
# Telemetry resource for enhanced debugging metrics
apiVersion: telemetry.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: Telemetry
metadata:
  name: mesh-debug-telemetry
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  # Enable detailed metrics for troubleshooting
  metrics:
    - providers:
        - name: prometheus
      overrides:
        - match:
            metric: ALL_METRICS
            mode: CLIENT_AND_SERVER
          disabled: false
---
# NetworkPolicy to allow access to admin and debug ports
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-envoy-admin-debug-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    # Allow access to Envoy admin port
    - ports:
        - port: 15000
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 15100
          protocol: TCP
        - port: 15020
          protocol: TCP
